description: Inline probability caption that animates in sync with event() phases. Must be passed to an event() expression either inline or as a variable. Fades in at the start of its phase during playback. The display() label uses AsciiMath; the computed fraction is appended automatically.
utility: Display synced probability caption inside an event

arguments.name: position
arguments.description: Canvas position for the caption text

arguments.name: type
arguments.description: Phase and value: given (P(F), synced to given phase), event (P(E)), intersection (P(E∩F)), conditional (P(E|F), default, synced to event phase), sample (1/|S|)

arguments.name: display
arguments.description: Custom AsciiMath label for the left-hand side (e.g., "P(E|F)", "P(E nn F)")

examples.expression:
S = sspace(coin(3), at(4,10), view(10,10))
c1 = eventcaption(at(16, 24), type(given), display("P(F)"))
c2 = eventcaption(at(18, 24), type(intersection), display("P(E nn F)"))
c3 = eventcaption(at(20, 24), type(conditional), display("P(E|F)"))
E = event(S, "at least 2 H", given("first = T", hatchangle(20), c(steelblue)), fc(red), t(1), c1, c2, c3)

c0 = eventcaption(at(14, 24), type(sample), display("P(omega)"))
E = event(S, "at least 2 H", fc(red), c0)

E = event(S, "all b",
    given("at least 1 b", hatchangle(20), c(steelblue)),
    fc(red), t(1),
    eventcaption(at(16,10), type(given), display("P(F)")),
    eventcaption(at(18,10), type(conditional), display("P(E|F)"))
)
